tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"command -v dig; ls -l $(command -v dig); chmod a-x $(command -v dig); ls -l $(command -v dig); command -v python3; ls -l /usr/bin/python3; ping -c 1 -W 1 192.168.1.2; wget -q -T 4 --tries=3 --max-redirect=0 -O /dev/null http://1.1.1.1 2>/dev/null; ec=$?; if [ $ec -eq 0 -o $ec -eq 8 ]; then echo HTTP_STATUS:200; else echo HTTP_STATUS:000; fi"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
